title: Egyptian Date Delight
description: A romantic dessert-like treat from Egypt featuring chewy dates and crispy egg roll wrappers.

ingredients.name: egg roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

ingredients.name: almond butter
ingredients.notes: or sunflower seed butter for a nut-free option

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla extract, and salt.
Add a spoonful of the almond butter mixture to the center of each egg roll wrapper.
Place 2-3 pitted dates on top of the almond butter mixture.
Sprinkle coconut flakes and shredded coconut on top of the dates.
Brush edges of the egg roll wrapper with water.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up to form a tight cylinder.
Place the wrapped dates on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Broil for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the wrappers are golden brown.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
